problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Combining Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
